comment.body:
use daily posts for confirmation or denial of weekly scenario(s).  From Alma's current weekly post:  "Sentiment expectations
So all-in-all…
Monday is expected to be moderated but anxious.
Tuesday is expected to be more volatile, very headline sensitive, risk-off.
Wednesday is expected to be cautiously more calm. Optimism during the AM and moderation during PM. Consolidation after Tue.
Thursday is expected to be choppy, and hedging going on.
Friday is expected to turn towards slightly more optimistic. Weekly position unwind, worthless downside hedges gonna be closed, providing some support. Risk appetit remains low."
